mapper.select: SELECT KAKAO_ID, NICKNAME, PROFILE_IMAGE, AUTO_LOGIN_TOKEN, TO_CHAR(TOKEN_EXPIRE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS TOKEN_EXPIRE, TO_CHAR(LAST_LOGIN, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS LAST_LOGIN, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATED_AT FROM TUSER_KAKAO WHERE KAKAO_ID = #{kakaoId}
SELECT KAKAO_ID, NICKNAME, PROFILE_IMAGE FROM TUSER_KAKAO WHERE AUTO_LOGIN_TOKEN = #{token} AND TOKEN_EXPIRE > SYSDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TUSER_KAKAO ( KAKAO_ID, NICKNAME, PROFILE_IMAGE, AUTO_LOGIN_TOKEN, TOKEN_EXPIRE, LAST_LOGIN, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{kakaoId}, #{nickname}, #{profileImage}, #{autoLoginToken}, SYSDATE + 30, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE TUSER_KAKAO SET NICKNAME = #{nickname}, PROFILE_IMAGE = #{profileImage}, AUTO_LOGIN_TOKEN = #{autoLoginToken}, TOKEN_EXPIRE = SYSDATE + 30, LAST_LOGIN = SYSDATE WHERE KAKAO_ID = #{kakaoId}
